title: Public Showers/Baths * Homeless Women - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Basic Needs > Public Showers/Baths * Homeless Women 2 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - No Filter Homeless Families Homeless Men Homeless Women Homeless Youth Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF CATHOLIC CHARITIES HOMELESS SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides drop-in services including information and referral, showers, laundry facilities, a community meal, snacks, and coffee. Offers access to a phone, community voicemail, mailing address, and computers. 2740 SE Powell Boulevard #5 Portland, OR 97202 Eligibility: Non-parenting women age 25 and older who are experiencing homelessness. Well-mannered pets are allowed. Hours: Monday-Friday 10am-1pm Lunch: 11:30am-1pm Email (971) 222-1880 Get Directions Visit Website More Details UNION GOSPEL MISSION OF SALEM MEN'S MISSION SHOWER FACILITIES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers shower facilities. 777 Commercial Street NE Salem, OR 973010431 Eligibility: Adults age 18 and older and minors accompanied by a parent or guardian who are experiencing homelessness. Service animals accepted. Hours: 7 days per week 9am-4:30pm Email (503) 362-3983 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CATHOLIC CHARITIES HOMELESS SERVICES UNION GOSPEL MISSION OF SALEM SHOWER FACILITIES
